prompt_modifier: Professional Dutch B2B software interface design featuring clean, metric-driven dashboards with rounded corners and subtle shadows. Bright, high-contrast lighting in modern office environment. Color palette of corporate blues and clean whites with orange accent CTAs. Typography should be clear, authoritative sans-serif fonts with generous white space. Include floating UI cards displaying specific business metrics like '60% cost reduction' and '24/7 availability'. Composition should convey Dutch directness and technical competence with laptop screens showing AI specialist profiles and workflow automation tools. Overall mood: confident, results-oriented, and pragmatically professional.

Below in smaller text: 'Uw brug tussen strategie en technologie'. prompts.prompt: Professional Dutch B2B software interface design featuring clean, metric-driven dashboards with rounded corners and subtle shadows. Overall mood: confident, results-oriented, and pragmatically professional. Use the attached images as brand reference for brand colors and tone. Create: a two-panel workflow comparison ad. Full frame divided vertically 50/50. LEFT panel: desaturated gray-blue background. Header in bold dark text: 'Zonder AppMakelaar'. Below: a chaotic visual representing the old workflow — scattered project management tools, multiple overlapping browser tabs showing different systems, spreadsheet chaos, crossed-out calendar appointments, email overload icons. RIGHT panel: corporate blue background. Header in bold blue text: 'Met AppMakelaar'. Green checkmarks next to benefits: 'Eén dashboard voor alles', 'Real-time sync automatisch', '2 weken, niet 6 maanden'. Mood: calm, organized, efficient. Center divider: thin line with arrow pointing left to right. Bottom center: 'Zie het verschil — plan een gesprek'. 1:1 aspect ratio.
